metadata.name: Y8S1 Prototype System
metadata.source: Uploaded workbook: [Y8S1] Build Making Tool - The Division 2.xlsx
metadata.publicRule: Show Prototype System only for eligible non-exotic gear and weapons. Exotics are excluded.

summary: Prototype rolls and Prototype Augments can apply to eligible non-exotic gear and weapons. Exotics are not part of the prototype system.

rollExamples.label: Skill Tier
rollExamples.note: Prototype value shown in the spreadsheet dropdowns.

weaponRollNotes: Prototype weapon stat rows appear in the spreadsheet for primary weapon, secondary weapon, and sidearm slots.
Prototype weapon damage is modeled separately from normal weapon damage and weapon type damage.

augments.name: Amalgam
augments.description: Bullets can apply a random status effect.

augments.name: Anomaly
augments.description: Heal for a percentage of damage dealt by skills.

augments.name: Echo
augments.description: Chance to duplicate the damage of the last bullet fired.

augments.name: Entropy
augments.description: Converts a portion of armor to health. Bonus armor does not count.

augments.name: Paradox
augments.description: Chance to refill your magazine by 2 for each bullet spent.

augments.name: Quantum
augments.description: Chance to become immune to damage for 2 seconds when taking damage.

augments.name: Synesthesia
augments.description: Chance that shots hitting the target reduce active cooldowns by 0.2 seconds.

augments.name: Trapper
augments.description: Increased duration of applied crowd-control effects.
